data.content:
Tests ran only on `net9.0`. The command is:

```
dotnet test --framework net9.0
```

No tests were discovered though — the project doesn't appear to contain any test methods yet. The `--framework net9.0` flag restricts execution to the net9.0 target only, skipping net8.0.
